text: Dropped my gym routine for 2 months. Now I'm back and it hurts. Every rep is a reminder that I'm still chasing my dreams, no matter the pain.
decision_reason: Shares personal struggle and connects it to the audience's pain point

text: I see you, struggling to make progress. I'm right there with you. Every sacrifice, every painful step, is a step closer to making our dreams a reality. Don't give up, even when it feels like nobody else is making sacrifices like you are.

audience_fit.desire: belonging to a group that gets it

decision_reason: Acknowledges the audience's struggle and offers empathy and solidarity
